Operation 'accountsGetAccountsAccountIdBalances' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description lacks specificity about what balance data is returned. According to the API context, multiple balance types are available (available amount, blocked amount, automatically invested amount). The description should clarify these return values and mention the required permission for better AI agent understanding of what data will be provided.

data.current_summary: Obtém os saldos da conta identificada por accountId.
data.current_description: Método para obter os saldos da conta de depósito à vista, poupança ou pagamento pré-paga identificada por accountId mantida pelo cliente na instituição transmissora.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves balance information for the specified account (checking, savings, or prepaid payment account). Returns multiple balance types including available amount, blocked amount, and automatically invested amount. Requires ACCOUNTS_BALANCES_READ permission and valid consent.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about what balance data is returned. According to the API context, multiple balance types are available (available amount, blocked amount, automatically invested amount). The description should clarify these return values and mention the required permission for better AI agent understanding of what data will be provided.

message: Operation 'accountsGetAccountsAccountIdOverdraftLimits' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current summary is vague about the type of limits (overdraft). The description lacks specificity about what limit data is returned. According to the API context, three specific limit types are available: contracted limit, used limit, and unarranged overdraft amount. The description should clarify these return values, mention the required permission, and better explain the empty response scenario for AI agent clarity.

data.current_summary: Obtém os limites da conta identificada por accountId.
data.current_description: Método para obter os limites da conta de depósito à vista, poupança ou pagamento pré-paga identificada por accountId mantida pelo cliente na instituição transmissora. Para as instituições financeiras transmissoras que possuam contas sem limites associados devem retornar HTTP Status 200 com o objeto "data" vazio, sem nenhum atributo interno.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve overdraft limits for the specified account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves overdraft limit information for the specified checking, savings, or prepaid payment account. Returns contracted overdraft limit, used overdraft limit, and unarranged overdraft amount. If the account has no associated overdraft limits, returns HTTP 200 with an empty data object. Requires ACCOUNTS_OVERDRAFT_LIMITS_READ permission and valid consent.
data.reasoning: The current summary is vague about the type of limits (overdraft). The description lacks specificity about what limit data is returned. According to the API context, three specific limit types are available: contracted limit, used limit, and unarranged overdraft amount. The description should clarify these return values, mention the required permission, and better explain the empty response scenario for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'accountsGetAccountsAccountIdReservedBalances' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. The current description is too brief and lacks important context. It doesn't explain what account types support this operation, what data is returned, or the required permissions. The term 'caixinhas/reserva' needs clarification for international AI agents. The description should specify that this applies to savings products, mention the required permission (ACCOUNTS_BALANCES_READ), and clarify the return values for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Obtém os saldos reservados em produtos caixinhas/reserva.
data.current_description: Método para obter os saldos reservados em produtos caixinhas/reserva.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves reserved balance information for savings products (caixinhas/reserva) associated with the specified account. Returns reserved balance amounts for each savings product. Requires ACCOUNTS_BALANCES_READ permission and valid consent. Only applicable to accounts with active savings products.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks important context. It doesn't explain what account types support this operation, what data is returned, or the required permissions. The term 'caixinhas/reserva' needs clarification for international AI agents. The description should specify that this applies to savings products, mention the required permission (ACCOUNTS_BALANCES_READ), and clarify the return values for better AI agent interpretability.
